ddt:Target.Name: SCCM420_Kostal_0x4002_00.02.01.ddt
ddt:Target.Description:
Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter. Kostal VS11 : 0x4002
Steering Column Control Module for the car line 420 (SCCM 420 / SCCM VS11) with a
CAN-Interface for the Chassis Network and a CAN-Interface for the Steering Wheel.
The entry variant has no CAN-Interface for the Steering Wheel, but a voltage coded horn instead.
The Steering Column Control Module provides the diagnosis functionality:
T urn I ndicator S witch diagnosis
F ront W iper S witch diagnosis
R ear W iper S witch diagnosis
T ip W iper S witch diagnosis
H igh B eam/Flashlight S witch diagnosis
Failure management S teering A ngle S ensor diagnosis
Module specific information

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Functional preconditions not fulfilled + High Beam
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Flash Light
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Turn Indicator Left
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Turn Indicator Right
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Interval I
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Interval II
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Stage I
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Stage II
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Tip wiping
Functional preconditions not fulfilled + Tip Wiping

Data.Name: Variant Power Supply Steering Wheel available
Variant Steering Wheel Heating - SWSP available
Variant Steering Wheel Heating - SCCM available
Heating active measured current too low
Max. current with heating OFF exceeded

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

DataItem.Name: Variant Power Supply Steering Wheel available
Variant Steering Wheel Heating - SWSP available
Variant Steering Wheel Heating - SCCM available
Heating active measured current too low
Max. current with heating OFF exceeded

Request.Name: DataRead.LK Internal SAS Info Memory Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read

Test.Description: An internal control unit reset was performed. Watchdog / Safety ?C Failure.
The steering angle sensor has a malfunction. Signal Above Allowable Range.
The steering angle speed of the steering angle sensor is outside the valid range. Signal Rate of Change Above Threshold.
There is an internal fault in the steering angle sensor. Signal Plausibility Failure.
The button ''Steering wheel heater" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The button ''Steering wheel heater" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The button ''Steering wheel heater" has a malfunction. Signal Stuck In Range.
The switch "Turn signal" has a malfunction. General Signal Failure.
The switch "Turn signal" has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
The switch "Turn signal" has a malfunction. Signal Above Allowable Range.
The switch "Turn signal" has a malfunction. Component Internal Failure.
The steering wheel electronics has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The steering wheel electronics has a malfunction. Circuit Current Above Threshold.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. General Checksum Failure.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. General Memory Failure.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. Calibration / Parameter Memory Failure.
The output for the steering wheel heater voltage supply and the ''steering wheel'' vibration motor has a malfunction. Internal Electronic Failure.
The circuit 15 has a malfunction. Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated.
The circuit 15 has a malfunction. Value of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect.
The power supply in the system is too low. Signal Below Allowable Range.
The power supply in the system is too high. Signal Above Allowable Range.
The power supply is too low. Signal Below Allowable Range.
The power supply is too high. Signal Above Allowable Range.
The steering column module has a malfunction. General Memory Failure.
The steering column module has a malfunction. Calibration / Parameter Memory Failure.
The steering column module has a malfunction. Internal Electronic Failure.
The steering column module has a malfunction. Invalid / Incompatible Software Component.
The switch "Windshield wiper" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The switch "Windshield wiper" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The button "Wipe and wash" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The button "Wipe and wash" has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The button "Wipe and wash" has a malfunction. Signal Stuck In Range.
The switch ''Rear window wiper'' has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The switch ''Rear window wiper'' has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery or Open.
The switch ''Rear window wiper'' has a malfunction. Signal Stuck In Range.
The switch ''High beams'' has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
The switch ''High beams'' has a malfunction. Signal Stuck In Range.
The button "Fanfare horns" has a malfunction. Signal Stuck in Range.
The chassis bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
The communication with the engine control module has a malfunction. Missing Message.
The communication with the front signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. Missing Message.
The communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction. Missing Message.
The communication with the air conditioning has a malfunction. Missing Message.
The communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction. Missing Message.
The steering wheel bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
The communication with the steering wheel electronics has a malfunction. Missing Message.
